label: GPT-5 Codex (OpenAI)
notes: Requires OPENAI_API_KEY. Model id should match what your OpenAI account is entitled to — change to gpt-4.1 etc. if gpt-5-codex isn't available to you.

label: Qwen 2.5 Coder (local / Ollama)
notes: Requires Ollama running locally. Install from ollama.com, then `ollama pull qwen2.5-coder`.
